code:
﻿stateDiagram-v2
direction LR

[FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> OrderSubmitted
OrderSubmitted --> PaymentProcessing : ProcessPaymentCommand
PaymentProcessing --> StockReserving : PaymentProcessedEvent
PaymentProcessing --> OrderFailed : PaymentFailedEvent / CancelOrder
PaymentProcessing --> OrderFailed : PaymentTimeoutEvent / CancelPayment + CancelOrder

StockReserving --> ShipmentCreating : StockReservedEvent
StockReserving --> OrderFailed : StockReservationFailedEvent / RefundPayment + CancelOrder
StockReserving --> OrderFailed : StockTimeoutEvent / CancelOrder

ShipmentCreating --> OrderCompleted : ShipmentCreatedEvent / OrderCompletedEvent
ShipmentCreating --> OrderFailed : ShipmentFailedEvent / ReleaseStock + RefundPayment + CancelOrder

OrderCompleted --> [FinTech_AuthVault]
OrderFailed --> [FinTech_AuthVault]

note right of PaymentProcessing
  Timeout: 5 min
  Reintentos: exponencial (FinTech_FraudDetection)
end note

note right of StockReserving
  Timeout: 2 min
  Compensación si falla:
  - RefundPayment
  - CancelOrder
end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个支付订单的状态流转图，核心是FinTech_PaymentGateway到FinTech_AuthVault的完整生命周期。起点是OrderSubmitted，然后进入PaymentProcessing状态。
明白，PaymentProcessing之后应该有两个分支吧？一个是支付成功，一个是失败。成功的话是走StockReserving吗？
对，PaymentProcessedEvent触发StockReserving。但失败的情况要细分：PaymentFailedEvent和PaymentTimeoutEvent都要走到OrderFailed，而且超时是5分钟，需要配合FinTech_FraudDetection做指数退避重试。
好的，我把PaymentProcessing的note加上去了，标注了5分钟超时和指数退避重试。那StockReserving之后呢？
StockReserving成功的话走StockReservedEvent到ShipmentCreating，失败或2分钟超时都要到OrderFailed。这里要注意补偿机制：失败时要RefundPayment加CancelOrder，超时的话直接CancelOrder。
ShipmentCreating的终点应该是OrderCompleted吧？失败的话是不是也要回滚？
没错，ShipmentCreatedEvent触发OrderCompleted，同时发出OrderCompletedEvent。但ShipmentFailedEvent最严重，要ReleaseStock、RefundPayment、CancelOrder三连补偿，然后到OrderFailed。最后OrderCompleted和OrderFailed都连到FinTech_AuthVault。
完成了，两个note我都加上了：PaymentProcessing标注了5分钟超时和FinTech_FraudDetection重试，StockReserving标注了2分钟超时和补偿动作。整个流程从左到右，起点FinTech_PaymentGateway，终点FinTech_AuthVault，你看看还有要调整的吗？
